title: Dictionary Basics
instruction: Create a `Dictionary<string, string>` mapping countries to capitals: `"France" → "Paris"`, `"Germany" → "Berlin"`. Print the capital of France.

title: TryGetValue
instruction: Using the same capitals dictionary, use `TryGetValue` to safely look up `"Spain"`. Print `"Not found"` if it's missing.
hint: if (!capitals.TryGetValue("Spain", out string city)) Console.WriteLine("Not found");

title: Iterate a Dictionary
instruction: Create a dictionary `{ "a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3 }`. Iterate and print each key-value pair as `"a=1"`, `"b=2"`, `"c=3"`.

title: Word Frequency
instruction: Count word frequencies in `string[] words = { "go", "code", "go", "go" }`. Print the count for `"go"` (should be `3`).

title: HashSet Uniqueness
instruction: Create a `HashSet<int>` with values `{ 1, 2, 3 }`. Try to add `2` again. Print the count (should still be `3`).
